name: Abadoo's Walnut Bread for Bread Makers
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the water, sugar, egg, and salt in the bread maker.
2. Add the all-purpose flour, butter, bread flour, dry yeast, nonfat dry milk powder, and chopped walnuts to the bread maker.
3. Select the Sweet cycle and ensure it is not set on timer mode before starting the bread making process.
